hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or ''; f.endswith('.py') and [subprocess.run(['python','-m','ruff','format',f],check=False), subprocess.run(['python','-m','ruff','check','--fix',f],check=False)]" 2>/dev/null || true
